title: 4 Pcs 8 oz Condiment Squeeze Bottles for Sauce, Plastic Squeeze Bottles, Squirt Bottle Oil Container Dispenser for Ketchup, Sauce, BBQ, Grilling, Salad Dressing, Honey,Paint and Craft
features: 【Seasoning Condiment Squeeze Bottles Set】The product set includes 4 pcs 8oz seasoning squeeze bottles, 1 foldable silicone funnel, 1 cleaning brush, 1 waterproof and oil proof sauce name label, and a whiteboard pen. The seasoning squeeze bottle is the best assistant for your kitchen cooking, making it convenient for you to store and use various seasonings.Very suitable for various occasions, such as kitchens, wilderness camping, outdoor barbecues, restaurants, bars, etc.

【Durable Food Grade Plastic Sauce Bottle】This 8-ounce seasoning squeeze bottle is made of high-quality materials and does not contain bisphenol A.It is non-toxic, odorless, environmentally friendly, high-temperature resistant, lightweight, durable, easy to squeeze, with a wide mouth design and a silicone funnel. Convenient to add sauce to the seasoning squeeze bottle.(Attention: Do not put it in the microwave for heating.)

【Leak Proof Design】Our seasoning squeeze bottle is equipped with a leak proof and detachable lid, which is tightly connected and firmly fixed to the squeeze bottle, effectively preventing overflow and leakage. The lid adopts a leak proof elastic silicone flap outlet design, and the sauce outlet only opens after being squeezed. At the same time, the lid is also connected to a small stopper, which can be used to block air and dirt.

【Convenient ＆ Reusable Squirt Bottle】Our wide mouth design and matching cleaning brush make it very convenient to clean our condiment squeeze bottles. You can also put the squeeze sauce bottles in the dishwasher for cleaning. These squeeze sauce bottles can be reused multiple times without worrying about deformation or odor.Our semi transparent seasoning bottle has a moderate nozzle size, which is neither too large to waste sauce nor too small to make it difficult to squeeze out sauce.

【Widely Used】The seasoning bottle squeezing bottle has a standard scale line, allowing you to accurately squeeze the sauce and check the remaining capacity of the sauce through the semi transparent squeezing bottle and scale. Therefore, it is very suitable for storing various sauces, such as oil, vinegar, barbecue sauce, olive oil, tomato sauce, mustard, mayonnaise, chili sauce, honey, salad dressing, etc. It can also be used to store glue, ink, pigments, paint, dyes and other handicrafts.
